## Endpoints

- The [Cars](#cars-endpoint) endpoint
- The [Cars Manufacturer](#cars-manufacturer-endpoint) endpoint
- The [Cars Owners](#cars-owners-endpoint) endpoint
- The [Cars Jobs](#cars-jobs-endpoint) endpoint
- The [Manufacturers](#manufacturers-endpoint) endpoint (not required but useful for tests)

## Cars endpoint

An endpoint to manage cars.

### Create cars

#### Using curl

```sh
# Create one with autogenerated id
$ curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/cars  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"manufacturerId":"1","firstRegistrationDate":"2018-07-26T08:17:30.635Z","price":3000}'
$ curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/cars  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"manufacturerId":"2","firstRegistrationDate":"2018-07-26T08:17:30.635Z","price":4000}'
$ curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/cars  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"manufacturerId":"2","firstRegistrationDate":"2018-07-26T08:17:30.635Z","price":5000}'

# Create one with custom id
$ curl -X PUT http://localhost:3000/cars/1  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"manufacturerId":"1","firstRegistrationDate":"2018-07-26T08:17:30.635Z","price":3000}'
$ curl -X PUT http://localhost:3000/cars/2  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"manufacturerId":"2","firstRegistrationDate":"2018-07-26T08:17:30.635Z","price":4000}'
$ curl -X PUT http://localhost:3000/cars/3  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"manufacturerId":"1","firstRegistrationDate":"2018-07-26T08:17:30.635Z","price":5000}'

# Create many
$ curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/cars/bulk  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"bulk":[{"manufacturerId":"1","firstRegistrationDate":"2018-07-26T08:17:30.635Z","price":3000},{"id":"4","manufacturerId":"1","firstRegistrationDate":"2018-07-26T08:17:30.635Z","price":4000},{"id":"5","manufacturerId":"2","firstRegistrationDate":"2018-07-26T08:17:30.635Z","price":5000}]}'
```

### Update cars

#### Using curl

```sh
# Update
$ curl -X PATCH http://localhost:3000/cars/1  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"firstRegistrationDate":"2017-07-30T08:17:30.635Z"}'
$ curl -X PATCH http://localhost:3000/cars/2  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"price":2000}'

# Replace
$ curl -X PUT http://localhost:3000/cars/3  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"manufacturerId":"2","firstRegistrationDate":"2018-07-30T08:17:30.635Z","price":15000}'
```

### Retrieve cars

#### Using curl

```sh
# All
$ curl -X GET http://localhost:3000/cars

# One
$ curl -X GET http://localhost:3000/cars/1
```

## Cars Manufacturer endpoint

An endpoint to retreive cars manufacturer.

#### Using curl

```sh
$ curl -X GET http://localhost:3000/cars/1/manufacturer
```

## Cars Owners endpoint

An endpoint to manage cars owners.

### Create cars owners

#### Using curl

```sh
# Create one with autogenerated id
$ curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/cars/1/owners  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"name":"Test1 Auto", "purchaseDate":"2019-01-22T08:17:30.635Z"}'
$ curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/cars/1/owners  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"name":"Test2 Auto", "purchaseDate":"2019-01-22T08:17:30.635Z"}'

# Create one with custom id
$ curl -X PUT http://localhost:3000/cars/1/owners/1  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"name":"Test2", "purchaseDate":"2019-01-22T08:17:30.635Z"}'
$ curl -X PUT http://localhost:3000/cars/1/owners/2  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"name":"Test3", "purchaseDate":"2019-01-22T08:17:30.635Z"}'

# Create many
$ curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/cars/bulk  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"bulk":[{"name":"Test3 Auto", "purchaseDate":"2019-01-22T08:17:30.635Z"}, {"id":"3","name":"Test3", "purchaseDate":"2019-01-22T08:17:30.635Z"}]}'
```

### Update cars owners

#### Using curl

```sh
# Update
$ curl -X PATCH http://localhost:3000/cars/1  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"purchaseDate":"2018-12-22T08:17:30.635Z"}'
$ curl -X PATCH http://localhost:3000/cars/2  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"name":"Test2 Up"}'

# Replace
$ curl -X PUT http://localhost:3000/cars/3  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"name":"Test3 Up","purchaseDate":"2018-12-22T08:17:30.635Z"}'
```

### Retrieve cars owners

#### Using curl

```sh
# All
$ curl -X GET http://localhost:3000/cars/1/owners

# One
$ curl -X GET http://localhost:3000/cars/1/owners/1
```

## Cars Jobs endpoint

An endpoint to trigger a process which will automatically remove the owners who bought their cars before the last
18 months and apply a discount of 20% to all cars having a date of first registration between 12 and
18 months.

### Create cars jobs

#### Using curl

```sh
# Create one
$ curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/cars/jobs
```

### Retrieve cars jobs

#### Using curl

```sh
# All
$ curl -X GET http://localhost:3000/cars/jobs

# One
$ curl -X GET http://localhost:3000/cars/jobs/1
```

## Manufacturers endpoint

An endpoint to manage manufacturers.

### Create manufacturers

#### Using curl

```sh
# Create one with autogenerated id
$ curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/manufacturers -H 'Content-Type:application/json'  -d '{"name":"Test Auto 1"}'
$ curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/manufacturers  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"name":"Test Auto 2","siret":20}'
$ curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/manufacturers  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"name":"Test Auto 3"}'

# Create one with custom id
$ curl -X PUT http://localhost:3000/manufacturers/1  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"name":"Test 1"}'
$ curl -X PUT http://localhost:3000/manufacturers/2  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"name":"Test 2","siret":21}'
$ curl -X PUT http://localhost:3000/manufacturers/3  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"name":"Test 3"}'

# Create many
$ curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/manufacturers/bulk  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"bulk":[{"name":"Test Bulk 1"}, {"id":"4","name":"Test Bulk 2"}]}'
```

### Update manufacturers

#### Using curl

```sh
# Update
$ curl -X PATCH http://localhost:3000/manufacturers/1  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"name":"Test 1 Up"}'
$ curl -X PATCH http://localhost:3000/manufacturers/2  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"siret":2}'
$ curl -X PATCH http://localhost:3000/manufacturers/3  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"name":"Test 3 Up","phone":"+33610203040"}'

# Replace
$ curl -X PUT http://localhost:3000/manufacturers/1  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"name":"Test 1 Replace"}'
$ curl -X PUT http://localhost:3000/manufacturers/3  -H 'Content-Type:application/json' -d '{"name":"Test 3 Replace","phone":"+33650607080"}'
```

### Retrieve manufacturers

#### Using curl

```sh
# All
$ curl -X GET http://localhost:3000/manufacturers

# One
$ curl -X GET http://localhost:3000/manufacturers/1
```
